#                --output svg/Serif/lc/051B.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: ԛ
comment "Cyrillic Small Letter Qa uni051B"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 426 0 /uni051B
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+051B"
move 1400
